Name: Lisa C.
quote: 1st time visiting and would definitely return. Highly recommended their bottomless brunch — staff couldn't do enough for you, very friendly and fantastic atmosphere.

Name: BDavis
quote: We shared the 5 Tapas Board which was delicious — every dish was packed with flavour. Our server Abbie was so pleasant and attentive. The atmosphere was lively but relaxed, ideal for catching up after work. Would definitely recommend.

Name: Colette J.
quote: Love this place! The best pint of Guinness on the fell, can always have a good chat with the bar staff. Food is amazing as well!

Name: FrequentFlier
quote: Tried the Bank Smash Burger — it was fantastic! Juicy, flavoursome, and cooked perfectly. Easily one of the best burgers I've had in a while. Perfect place for good food, great cocktails, and a relaxed night out.

Name: Eric M.
quote: We took our grandchildren for a treat for mocktails. The staff were so friendly and helpful — they worked out the best deal for drinks and even brought some chips. Such a great welcome and wonderful service.

Name: Joanne G.
quote: I've taken my elderly mum, who is a wheelchair user, to The Bank twice for lunch and each time the meals were very good. The staff are very courteous and made sure mum had everything she needed. I recommend this bar restaurant without reservation.
